---
title: "Landmarks of History III. Modern History: From the Reformation to the Fall of Napoleon. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe” and “The Kings of England.”"
---

## Landmarks of History III. Modern History: From the Reformation to the Fall of Napoleon. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe” and “The Kings of England.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1857
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6 Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co. 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
